logout.title: Sign out?
logout.description: You'll need to log in again to access your account.

hero.headline: Together We Support, Educate and Heal
hero.subtext: Every donation helps a family grow stronger, healthier, and more secure. Together, we build a future full of possibilities.

campaigns.giveRegularly: Give a little, regularly. Cancel anytime.
campaigns.securedBy: Secured by Razorpay · Cards · UPI · Netbanking

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your giving journey.
login.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Join CauseKind and start making a difference.
register.createSubtitle: Create your account and start making a difference today.
register.googleLinkedSubtitle: Your Google account is linked. Just add your phone and location to finish.
register.noStatesListed: No states listed — enter city below.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account and view your giving history.

footer.tagline: India's verified giving platform. Zero fees for donors. 100% of your donation goes directly to the cause.

donate.title: Make a Donation
donate.subtitle: Choose a cause you care about

donate_page.heading: Give Directly
donate_page.subtitle: 100% reaches the cause. Zero platform fees.
donate_page.tipSubtext: Tips keep CauseKind free for everyone.
donate_page.monthlySubtext: Give a little, regularly. Cancel anytime.
donate_page.monthlyNote: Your card will be charged every month via Razorpay eMandate. You can cancel at any time from your profile.
donate_page.confirmTerms: By donating you agree to our terms. Funds are transferred directly after campaign verification.
donate_page.monthlyAutopay: Monthly autopay via Razorpay eMandate · Cancel anytime

dashboard.noCampaigns: You haven't created any campaigns yet.
dashboard.noListings: You haven't listed any items yet.
dashboard.noRequests: You haven't made any item requests yet.

how.title: How CauseKind Works
how.subtitle: Three simple steps to make a real difference.
how.step1Desc: Browse verified campaigns and in-kind requests near you.
how.step2Desc: Every campaign is admin-verified. Your donation goes directly to the cause.
how.step3Desc: Track your giving and receive updates from the people you help.

cta.title: Ready to make a difference?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of donors helping families across India.

inkind.title: In-Kind Donations
inkind.subtitle: Donate items directly to people who need them most.

listings.title: Community Listings
listings.subtitle: Items available to give — claim what you need.

verify.title: How We Verify
verify.subtitle: Every campaign goes through a strict verification process before going live.

why.title: Why raise funds through us
why.subtitle: Every donation is verified, zero-fee, and delivered directly to someone who truly needs it.

what.title: What we Provide
what.subtitle: Three ways to give, all under one roof.

inkindSection.title: In-Kind Requests
inkindSection.subtitle: Donees request physical items they need. You can match their requests and donate items directly, bypassing shipping fees through local radius matches.

listingsSection.title: Community Listings
listingsSection.subtitle: Browse physical items listed by donors in your neighborhood offering school bags, books, uniforms, and toys for free pickup.

ctaSection.headline: Be the change in someone's story.
ctaSection.subtext: Whether it's a micro-donation of ₹100 or spare textbooks, notebooks, and clothes — your act of giving makes an immediate difference.

features.adminVerifiedDesc: Every campaign and item request is reviewed by our team before it goes live. Nothing gets through without a real check.
features.zeroFeesDesc: We charge nothing. Every rupee you donate or every item you give reaches the person who needs it.
features.localMatchingDesc: Item donations are matched with people within 10 km of you, making drop-offs simple and quick.
features.impactCertificatesDesc: After your donation is delivered, you receive a verified certificate you can keep or share.

provide.verifiedCampaignsDesc: Every person who posts a campaign is checked by our team first. You know your money is going somewhere real.
provide.moneyOrItemsDesc: Donate cash to a campaign, or give physical items like books, clothes, or a laptop to someone nearby.
provide.localDropoffsDesc: Item donations are matched within 10 km. No couriers, no shipping fees — just direct giving to a neighbour.
